name: Bad Bunny (Benito Martínez Ocasio)
role: Artist — Puerto Rican rapper, singer, songwriter
quote: I feel free. I do what I want. I wear what I want. I say what I want. I live my life and I'm proud of it.

name: Noah Assad
role: CEO & Founder, Rimas Entertainment — Bad Bunny's manager since 2016
quote: Label revenue is 50% of his business, publishing is around 30%, touring is 15% to 18%, and sponsorships are 5%.

name: J Balvin
role: Colombian reggaetón superstar — collaborator on 'I Like It,' 'Oasis' EP, and 'Un Día'
quote: Bad Bunny changed the game for all of us. He proved the world will listen to Spanish.

name: Daddy Yankee
role: Puerto Rican reggaetón pioneer — marched alongside Bad Bunny in 2019 Puerto Rico protests
quote: Puerto Rico tiene que ser primero. (Puerto Rico has to come first.)

name: Jhay Cortez
role: Puerto Rican singer-songwriter — featured on global #1 'Dakiti'; frequent live collaborator
quote: 'Dakiti' was a whole new level for us. Eight weeks at #1 globally — I didn't think that was possible for us.

name: Rosalía
role: Spanish singer — featured on 'La Noche de Anoche' from El Último Tour del Mundo
quote: Benito is someone who is fearless. He does what he wants artistically and it's incredibly inspiring.

name: Cardi B
role: American rapper — featured on #1 Hot 100 'I Like It' (2018) and Super Bowl LX halftime show (2026)
quote: I Like It is one of my favorite songs I've ever been a part of. Bunny is just different.

name: Drake
role: Canadian rapper — featured on 'MIA' (#5 Hot 100, 2018), one of Bad Bunny's first major English crossover collabs
quote: Bad Bunny is one of the most talented artists I've ever worked with. Period.

name: Li Saumet (Bomba Estéreo)
role: Colombian artist — featured on 'Ojitos Lindos' from Un Verano Sin Ti, showcasing Bad Bunny's genre range
quote: Benito has such a clear idea of what he wants, and he is open to explore new ideas, without fears.

name: Tainy
role: Puerto Rican producer and artist — key collaborator and producer on multiple albums and singles
quote: We grew up together. Bad Bunny, me, we're all from the same place, from the same culture, and that's what you hear in every record.

name: Residente (René Pérez Joglar)
role: Puerto Rican artist and activist — collaborated on '2019 protest anthem 'Afilando los Cuchillos'
quote: When the people called, Bad Bunny came. That says everything about who he is.

name: Karol G
role: Colombian reggaetón artist — guest at Super Bowl LX halftime show (Feb 2026)
quote: To share the Super Bowl stage with Bad Bunny — that's something I'll tell my grandchildren about.
